series_metadata.series_description: Documents and correspondence submitted to the Secretary of State’s office by county board of elections pursuant to RC 3501.11(x), and resulting correspondence sent by the Secretary of State to the county boards.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copies and electronic version for four (4) years, then may destroy. ; Electronic: Retain hard copies and electronic version for four (4) years, then may destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
